params.name: Silhouette of a Beauty
params.description: On the shimmering river lit by glowing streetlights are reflections of young ones happily dancing. The deity of the River of Wishes captured this moment of joy, freezing it as a silhouette in time, embodying the god's blessings for the beauty of the mortal world.
